goal: Implement safe design/scaffolding or safe-env-only profile switching proof.
whatWasImplemented: Added safe-env-only profile symlink switching proof for temporary profile fixtures.
Added restore verification for temp symlink switching.
Added disabled production profile switch review model.
Added a disabled profile switch selection review model with current profile, resolved target, selected target, and symlink path fields.
The selection review distinguishes no target selected from selected-target review while keeping confirmation, reload, and production switch disabled.
Added forced restore failure test coverage.
Recorded that real profile/mode switching remains disabled.
Kept profile/mode safe-batch blocking asserted by deterministic tests.
Defined safe-env symlink/profile switching as the next acceptable proof path.
Added a profile target approval review model that distinguishes no selection, missing target, target outside safe-env, and safe-env-only review states.
Added deterministic tests proving real-session profile paths are refused as outside safe-env and production switching remains disabled.
No additional production-safe profile switching step was available this sprint without explicit real-session switching approval.
This sprint rechecked profile/mode switching and found no safe production step without explicit real-session approval and restore protocol.
whatWasNotImplemented: No real mode script was run.
No profile switching UI control was activated.
blockers: Needs backup/restore model for symlink targets and profile files before any real switch can be considered.
Needs explicit user approval before any real session profile switch.
Real mode scripts, reload, AGS restart, and Waybar restart remain blocked.
nextRecommendedWork: Extend safe-env profile fixtures with invalid target and restore-failure cases, then define explicit approval requirements for real switching.
